urls.title: Job Board URLs
urls.description: Lever job board URLs to scrape. Each entry can be a plain URL string, or an object with a required `url` plus optional per-board filters (use the JSON tab): `departments` (array of department name strings to keep, case-insensitive, filtered before storing), `teams` (array of team name strings), `maxJobs` (integer cap per board), `daysBack` (integer; only jobs created in the last N days). Example: {"url": "https://jobs.lever.co/anchorage", "departments": ["Engineering"], "teams": ["Blockchain"], "maxJobs": 20, "daysBack": 7}. Unlike Greenhouse, department and team are plain names, so no ID lookup is needed.
